205: // CreateStaticCredentialPasswordCli uses the cli to create a new password credential in the
206: // provided static credential store.
207: // Returns the id of the new credential
208: func CreateStaticCredentialPasswordCli(t testing.TB, ctx context.Context, credentialStoreId string, user string, password string) (string, error) {
209: 	name, err := base62.Random(16)
210: 	if err != nil {
211: 		return "", err
212: 	}
213: 
214: 	output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
215: 		e2e.WithArgs(
216: 			"credentials", "create", "username-password",
217: 			"-credential-store-id", credentialStoreId,
218: 			"-username", user,
219: 			"-password", "env://E2E_CREDENTIALS_PASSWORD",
220: 			"-name", fmt.Sprintf("e2e Credential %s", name),
221: 			"-description", "e2e",
222: 			"-format", "json",
223: 		),
224: 		e2e.WithEnv("E2E_CREDENTIALS_PASSWORD", password),
225: 	)
226: 	if output.Err != nil {
227: 		return "", fmt.Errorf("%w: %s", output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
228: 	}
229: 
230: 	var createCredentialsResult credentials.CredentialCreateResult
231: 	err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &createCredentialsResult)
232: 	if err != nil {
233: 		return "", err
234: 	}
235: 
236: 	credentialId := createCredentialsResult.Item.Id
237: 	t.Logf("Created Username/Password Credentials: %s", credentialId)
238: 	return credentialId, nil
239: }
240:

245: 	name, err := base62.Random(16)

248: 	}
249:

251: 		e2e.WithArgs(
252: 			"credentials", "create", "username-password-domain",
253: 			"-credential-store-id", credentialStoreId,
254: 			"-username", user,
255: 			"-password", "env://E2E_CREDENTIALS_PASSWORD",
256: 			"-domain", domain,
257: 			"-name", fmt.Sprintf("e2e Credential %s", name),
258: 			"-description", "e2e",
259: 			"-format", "json",

263: 	if output.Err != nil {

275: 	return credentialId, nil
276: }

278: // CreateStaticCredentialJsonCli uses the cli to create a new json credential in the provided
279: // static credential store.
280: // Returns the id of the new credential
281: func CreateStaticCredentialJsonCli(t testing.TB, ctx context.Context, credentialStoreId string, jsonFilePath string) (string, error) {
282: 	name, err := base62.Random(16)
283: 	if err != nil {
284: 		return "", err

291: 			"-object", "file://"+jsonFilePath,
292: 			"-name", fmt.Sprintf("e2e Credential %s", name),
293: 			"-description", "e2e",
294: 			"-format", "json",
295: 		),
296: 	)
297: 	if output.Err != nil {
298: 		return "", fmt.Errorf("%w: %s", output.Err, string(output.Stderr))

300: 
301: 	var createCredentialsResult credentials.CredentialCreateResult
302: 	err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &createCredentialsResult)
303: 	if err != nil {
304: 		return "", err

306: 
307: 	credentialId := createCredentialsResult.Item.Id
308: 	t.Logf("Created Username/Password Credentials: %s", credentialId)
309: 	return credentialId, nil
310: }

312: // CreateStaticCredentialPasswordApi uses the API to create a new password credential in the

315: func CreateStaticCredentialPasswordApi(t testing.TB, ctx context.Context, client *api.Client, credentialStoreId string, user string, password string) (string, error) {

318: 		return "", err

320:

326: 	)
327: 	if err != nil {
328: 		return "", err
329: 	}
330:

333: 	return credentialId, nil
334: }
